execution: vitest run for pure-function grouping logic (TC-12, TC-13, TC-14, TC-15)
vite build for production bundle validation
code review of Vue components for UI/visual assertions (TC-1 to TC-11)
methodology.exclusions: TC-16/17 (theme CSS rendering), TC-18/19 (backward compat), TC-20/21/22 (Settings UI) — covered in separate v7-full pass; not in this core scope

cases.name: AgentRunBlock 容器 - streaming 状态条
cases.evidence: AgentRunBlock.vue line 9-13: run-status-bar div with conditional class 'run-status-bar--streaming' applied when isStreaming=true. <style scoped> lines 188-192 define 'animation: run-sweep 1.5s ease-in-out infinite' plus keyframes 0%/100% sliding background-position from 100% to -100%, producing 3px scan/light effect. height h-[3px] set via Tailwind.

cases.name: AgentRunBlock 容器 - complete 状态条
cases.evidence: AgentRunBlock.vue line 9-13: when isStreaming=false, class falls back to 'bg-border' (silent background color, no animation class). Template binds: ['run-status-bar h-[3px] rounded-t-sm overflow-hidden', isStreaming ? 'run-status-bar--streaming' : 'bg-border'].

cases.name: AgentRunBlock footer 字段
cases.evidence: AgentRunBlock.vue footer block (lines 51-61) renders three fields: (1) 步骤数 = sections.filter(s => s.type !== 'text').length → line 123-125; (2) 总耗时 = elapsedMs computed from thinking+toolCalls timestamps via useLiveTimer (real-time during streaming) or endTimes-startTimes (when complete) → lines 143-176; (3) 文件修改数 = toolCalls.filter(tc => standaloneTools.has(tc.toolName)).length → lines 127-133. formattedElapsed uses formatTime() from compact-utils for human-readable output.

cases.name: Text block 渲染
cases.evidence: AgentRunBlock.vue lines 26-37: text section rendered with v-else-if='section.type === "text" && message.content', class='msg__body select-text py-1 leading-[1.6] text-fg text-xs', v-html='renderedContent' (markdown rendered via useMarkdownRender composable). Same msg__body class as legacy non-compact path.

cases.name: Write toolCall 独立卡片
cases.evidence: When write is in standaloneTools, message-layout.ts isMergeBlock returns false for write toolCall blocks → grouped as type='standalone' (line 88-91 of message-layout.ts). AgentRunBlock.vue line 39-42 renders <StandaloneToolCard :tool-call='section.toolCall'> with v-else-if='section.type === "standalone" && section.toolCall'. StandaloneToolCard.vue displays tool name, file_path (extracted via toolPath from compact-utils), status badge, and elapsed time.

cases.name: Edit toolCall 独立卡片
cases.evidence: edit is in default standaloneTools (settings.ts line 22: ref<string[]>(['write', 'edit'])). Same rendering path as write — StandaloneToolCard treats any toolCall identically, displaying toolName, file_path, status, elapsed.

cases.name: 自定义工具独立卡片
cases.evidence: message-layout.ts line 88-91: isMergeBlock returns false for non-pi-built-in tools (toolName not in ALL_PI_TOOLS) → grouped as type='customTool'. AgentRunBlock.vue line 45-49 renders <StandaloneToolCard :tool-call='section.toolCall'> with v-else-if='section.type === "customTool" && section.toolCall'. Section resolution at line 100-104: toolCall pre-resolved from message.toolCalls.find(tc => tc.id === s.blocks[0].refId).

cases.name: MergeBlock chip 统计
cases.evidence: MergeBlock.vue chips computed (lines 95-115): iterates blocks, counts thinking and groups toolCalls by toolName. Output: [{variant: 'thinking', label: '思考', count: N}, {variant: 'tool', label: 'toolName', count: N}, ...]. Template (lines 16-21) renders as `{label} ×{count}`. Visual separator is implicit (space + chip background). For 3 thinking + 5 read + 2 grep: produces '思考 ×3 · read ×5 · grep ×2'.

cases.name: MergeBlock 展开/折叠
cases.evidence: MergeBlock.vue line 11: <div class='merge-bar' @click='toggleExpand'>. Line 76-79: const expanded = ref(false); function toggleExpand() { expanded.value = !expanded.value }. Line 32: <div v-show='expanded' class='merge-blocks'> reveals ThinkingBlock and ToolCallCard children. Chevron icon rotates 180deg via 'merge-bar__chevron--open' class (lines 23-26, 236-238).

cases.name: MergeBlock streaming - thinking 状态
cases.evidence: MergeBlock.vue streamStatusText computed (lines 140-167): priority chain — first checks 'lastThinking.endTime === undefined' (lines 142-145) → returns '思考中...'. Pulse dot (line 6: <span class='merge-stream__pulse'>) with @keyframes merge-pulse (line 280-283: opacity 1→0.4→1, scale 1→0.7→1, 2s loop). Elapsed time via useLiveTimer(200) updates streamElapsed every 200ms (lines 169-174).

cases.name: MergeBlock streaming - tool running 状态
cases.evidence: MergeBlock.vue streamStatusText (lines 147-152): when no active thinking, checks toolCalls.find(tc => tc.status === 'running') → returns `${tc.toolName} ${toolPath(tc.input) || '...'}`. toolPath extracts path/file_path/command from tc.input (compact-utils lines 32-46). Format matches spec 'read src/main.ts'.

cases.name: 分组 - 合并+text+合并 (AC-5 场景A)
cases.evidence: vitest run message-layout.test.ts:TC-12 passed (1ms). Input: contentBlocks=[thk, tc-read, tc-bash, text, thk, tc-read, thk, tc-grep], standalone={write,edit}. Output: 3 sections, types=['merge','text','merge'], merge block 0 = [thk1, tc-read, tc-bash], merge block 2 = [thk2, tc-read, thk3, tc-grep]. Matches spec AC-5 场景A exactly.

cases.name: 分组 - edit 独立展示 (AC-5 场景B)
cases.evidence: vitest run message-layout.test.ts:TC-13 passed (0ms). Input: contentBlocks=[thk, text, edit, text], standalone={write,edit}. Output: 3 sections, types=['merge','text','standalone'], merge block 0 = [thk1], standalone block 2 = [edit-tc]. Matches spec AC-5 场景B exactly.

cases.name: 分组 - 混合含 standalone + customTool (AC-5 场景C)
cases.evidence: vitest run message-layout.test.ts:TC-14 passed (0ms). Input: contentBlocks=[thk, tc-read, write, thk, tc-bash, text, subagent, text], standalone={write,edit}. Output: 5 sections, types=['merge','standalone','merge','text','customTool']. merge block 0 = [thk, tc-read], standalone block 1 = [write], merge block 2 = [thk, tc-bash], text block 3, customTool block 4 = [subagent]. Matches spec AC-5 场景C exactly.

cases.name: 分组 - standaloneTools 变更影响 (AC-5 场景D)
cases.evidence: vitest run message-layout.test.ts:TC-15 passed (2 tests, 0ms each). Test 1: standalone={write,edit,bash} → [thk, tc-bash] groups as ['merge','standalone'], bash moves out. Test 2: standalone={write,edit} (default) → [thk, tc-bash] groups as ['merge'], bash stays in MergeBlock. Confirms bash tool's classification is reactive to standaloneTools set changes.

notes: Core scope covers TC-1 to TC-15 (AC-1 through AC-5) — the fundamental refactor behavior.
TC-12 to TC-15 (grouping logic) verified via vitest unit tests with deterministic assertions matching spec AC-5 4 scenarios.
TC-1 to TC-11 (visual/UI behavior) verified via code review of AgentRunBlock.vue, MergeBlock.vue, StandaloneToolCard.vue against spec acceptance criteria.
TC-16/17 (theme), TC-18/19 (backward compat), TC-20/21/22 (Settings UI) deferred to v7-full pass — not in this core scope.
All build gates pass: vue-tsc=0 errors, vite build=success, vitest=10/10 pass.
